channel.title: Michael Vivirito — Blog
channel.description: SRE, FreeBSD, networking, and self-hosted infrastructure. Real-world DevOps from the trenches.

item.title: Building a FreeBSD pf Router
item.description: A practical, opinionated guide to building a FreeBSD edge router from a 4-port mini PC. ZFS root, pf, unbound, and dhcpd — from boot media to a working gateway.

item.title: pf.conf: Writing Rules That Survive a Power Outage
item.description: A deep dive on FreeBSD pf rule design — macros, tables, NAT, anti-spoofing, state tracking, and a real residential gateway ruleset you can adapt.

item.title: FreeBSD Jails for Network Services
item.description: Using FreeBSD jails to isolate DNS, monitoring, and VPN on a single router. VNET vs shared networking, ZFS datasets, jail.conf, and pf integration.

item.title: IPv6 for Home Networks: A FreeBSD Walkthrough
item.description: A practical guide to running real, native IPv6 on a FreeBSD home router. Prefix delegation, rtsold, dhcp6c, rtadvd, and pf rules — without breaking your IPv4 setup.

item.title: WireGuard on FreeBSD: A 30-Minute Setup
item.description: A practical, no-fluff guide to running a WireGuard VPN on FreeBSD. Kernel module, key generation, server and client config, pf rules, and DNS through the tunnel.

item.title: ZFS Send/Recv: Replicating Your Homelab
item.description: A practical guide to ZFS replication with send and recv. Snapshots, incremental streams, raw encrypted send, resumable transfers, and a working pull-based cron script.

item.title: FreeBSD vs Linux: An SRE's Take
item.description: A working SRE's honest comparison of FreeBSD and Linux. Init, networking, ZFS, jails vs containers, package management, and when to reach for each.

item.title: Kubernetes on Bare Metal: A Practical Guide
item.description: Skip the cloud. Own your stack. A real-world guide to running k8s on bare metal with Proxmox — kubeadm, Cilium, NFS storage, MetalLB, and backups.

item.title: AWS Cost Optimization: An SRE's Playbook
item.description: Real strategies, real numbers. From $2800/month to $1800/month without sacrificing reliability. Reserved instances, right-sizing, Spot fleets, and storage lifecycle.

item.title: Set Up Prometheus and Grafana Monitoring in 10 Minutes
item.description: Deploy Prometheus and Grafana with Docker Compose. Includes pre-configured alert rules, dashboards, and a downloadable monitoring toolkit.

item.title: Why I Run NixOS on My Servers
item.description: Declarative configuration, atomic rollbacks, and reproducible builds — lessons from running NixOS in production on Proxmox and bare metal.

item.title: Top 10 TUI Apps for Terminal Enthusiasts
item.description: The best terminal user interface apps for productivity and style — from file managers to system monitors to music players.
